underlying_goal: Improve the Legions of Darkness game UI and add CLI support, addressing visual bugs, missing labels, layout improvements, and CLI integration
friction_detail: Build failures due to missing file memberships in Xcode project targets required multiple iterations to fix.
brief_summary: User requested four UI fixes (track labels, card details in log, rotation bug, noisy log text), a two-column iPad layout, and CLI support for their game; all were implemented with some build configuration friction.
